get.description: Check if Auth V2 API is running

post.description: Register a new user with email and password. An OTP will be sent for email verification.
Authenticate user with email and password. May require OTP verification.
Verify email address using OTP sent during signup
Resend email verification OTP
Verify login OTP and create user session
Log out current user and destroy session
Request a password reset OTP. Response is generic to prevent email enumeration.
Verify OTP and set a new password.

get.description: Get the authenticated user's profile information

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's profile. All fields are optional.

post.description: Upload a profile photo. Accepts image files (png, jpg, jpeg, gif, webp). Max size 5MB.
Upload a header/cover image. Accepts image files (png, jpg, jpeg, gif, webp). Max size 5MB.
Change the authenticated user's password. Requires current password.

Submit BVN for async verification. Returns immediately with task ID.
Rate limited to 10 requests per hour.

Request Body:
    bvn: Bank Verification Number (11 digits)
    date_of_birth: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

Returns 202 Accepted with verification_id and task_id for tracking.

Submit NIN for async verification. Returns immediately with task ID.
Rate limited to 10 requests per hour.

Request Body:
    nin: National Identification Number (11 digits)
    date_of_birth: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

Returns 202 Accepted with verification_id and task_id for tracking.

get.description:
Get current user's verification status (not_started, processing, verified, failed).

Status values:
- not_started: User hasn't submitted verification
- processing: Verification in progress
- verified: Successfully verified
- failed: Verification failed

Get the status of a verification background task.
Use the task_id returned from verify_bvn or verify_nin.

Task States:
- PENDING: Task is waiting in queue
- STARTED: Task is currently executing
- SUCCESS: Task completed successfully
- FAILURE: Task failed permanently
- RETRY: Task failed and is retrying

Security: Only returns status for current user's verification.
Task results auto-expire after 1 hour.

Returns wallet details including account number, balance, currency, and status.
Wallet is created after identity verification (BVN/NIN).

Returns paginated list of transactions. Supports filtering by type (credit/debit).

Query Parameters:
    limit: Number of transactions (1-100, default 50)
    offset: Pagination offset (default 0)
    type: Filter by transaction type ('credit' or 'debit')

Returns wallet info, recent transactions, and summary statistics
including total credits, total debits, and transaction count.

post.description:
Initiates a deposit to wallet. Returns bank details for user to transfer funds.
Creates Bell MFB virtual account on-demand if not exists.

Rate limited to 5 requests per hour.

Withdraw funds from wallet to external bank account.
Fee: 2% or minimum ₦50.

Rate limited to 3 requests per hour.

This endpoint is called by providers, not by clients.

Security:
- Bell MFB: verifies webhook signature using HMAC-SHA256
- SafeHaven: validates payload shape; production should IP-allowlist SafeHaven at the edge
- Checks for duplicate processing using reference
- Uses database transaction for atomicity

get.description:
Query Parameters:
query: Search string
interest_id: Filter by interest category
visibility: Filter by visibility (public/private)
limit: Results per page (1-100, default 20)
offset: Pagination offset (default 0)

post.description: Creates a new community with the authenticated user as owner.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific community.

put.description: Update community details. Only owner/admin can update.

get.description: Returns member count, active bills, total collections, etc.

put.summary: Update community cover photo URL. Owner/admin only.
Update community profile picture URL. Owner/admin only.

get.description:
Query Parameters:
status: Membership status filter (default: active)
role: Role filter (owner/admin/member)
limit: Page size (default 50)
offset: Pagination offset (default 0)

post.description:
For PAID communities, use the membership payment flow:
1. POST /invite/{code}/join - Get payment details
2. POST /communities/{id}/membership/payment/initiate - Get virtual account
3. Make payment to virtual account
4. POST /communities/{id}/membership/payment/verify - Activate membership
Members can leave anytime. Owners cannot leave without transferring ownership.

put.description: Only owner/admin can update roles. Owner role can only be set by current owner.

get.description:
Query Parameters:
status: Filter by bill status (draft/active/closed/settled)
limit: Page size (default 50)
offset: Pagination offset (default 0)

post.description: Only owner/admin can create bills.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific bill.

post.description: Process payment for a community bill using wallet, transfer, or card.

get.description: Returns current balance and transaction summary. Only admin/owner can view.

post.description:
Transfer funds from community wallet to external bank account.
Only owner can initiate transfers.

Only owner/admin can create invites.
Set regenerate=true to create a new code, invalidating the old one.
Invalidates the current invite code. A new invite must be created.

get.description: Returns community info for the invite code. Public endpoint.

post.description:
For FREE communities: Joins directly.
For PAID communities: Returns payment information.

get.summary: Get transaction history for a community.
get.description: Only active community members can view this history.

post.description:
Creates a one-time virtual account for member to deposit to community wallet.
Funds are credited automatically once payment is confirmed.

Creates SafeHaven virtual account for user to pay community membership fee.
After payment, user must call /verify endpoint to activate membership.
After payment is made, call this to verify and activate membership.

get.description: Returns the latest membership payment status for the user.

Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

state.description: Celery state: PENDING, STARTED, SUCCESS, FAILURE, RETRY

is_joined.description: Whether authenticated user is an active member

description.example: A community for tech professionals in Lagos

category.description: Community categories as a list of names

subcategory.description: Community subcategories as a list of names

interest.description: Community interests as a list of names

organization_id.description: Optional organization ID. If omitted, default organization is auto-created/reused

paid_member_count.description: Number of distinct members who have paid

expected_member_count.description: Number of active non-owner members expected to pay

recipient_bank_code.description: NIBSS bank code of recipient bank (e.g. 058 for GTB)
